prompt: A user just said: 'ingest /tmp/knowledge-test/TestSmall/raw/articles/Rust闭包.md'. Follow the ingest skill to process this raw article into the TestSmall wiki. Save step-by-step log to transcript.md and final report to report.md.
assertions: The agent read the raw article /tmp/knowledge-test/TestSmall/raw/articles/Rust闭包.md
The agent created wiki pages in TestSmall/wiki/ (at least a summary page)
The agent updated TestSmall/wiki/index.md with new entries
The agent updated TestSmall/wiki/log.md with an ingest record
The agent moved the raw file to TestSmall/raw/archive/
The agent did NOT run any qmd commands (small scale should skip qmd)
The agent did NOT write to notes/ directory
